metadata.title: RealCap - Trusted Screenshot Tool | Prevent AI Forgery
metadata.description: RealCap is a trusted screenshot tool that prevents AI forgery. Verify screenshot authenticity, capture secure proof, and protect against fake screenshots.

hero.title: RealCap - Trusted Screenshot Tool
hero.subtitle: Prevent AI Forgery · Verifiable Capture · Secure Proof

trustProblem.title: The Growing Threat of Fake Screenshots
trustProblem.subtitle: AI-generated fake screenshots are causing billions in losses across industries. Traditional verification methods fail against sophisticated forgery techniques.

capture.title: Capture
capture.description: User initiates screenshot through RealCap app or browser extension

process.title: Process
process.description: Screenshot metadata is captured and encrypted at the moment of capture

verify.title: Verify
verify.description: Verification API confirms authenticity and provides tamper-proof proof

share.title: Share
share.description: Verified screenshot can be shared with confidence for any purpose

targetIndustries.title: Industries We Serve
targetIndustries.subtitle: RealCap provides specialized screenshot verification for trust-sensitive industries
targetIndustries.customSolution: Looking for a custom solution for your industry?

coreFeatures.title: Core Features
coreFeatures.subtitle: RealCap provides enterprise-grade screenshot verification capabilities

trustedCapture.title: Trusted Capture
trustedCapture.description: Screenshot metadata is captured at the moment of capture, creating an immutable authenticity record

aiDetection.title: AI Detection
aiDetection.description: Advanced algorithms detect AI-generated fake screenshots with 99.9% accuracy

verificationApi.title: Verification API
verificationApi.description: RESTful API for instant verification, batch processing, and webhook callbacks

crossPlatform.title: Cross-Platform
crossPlatform.description: Available on Windows, macOS, browser extension, and mobile apps
